phrases.cultural_note: Self-service scales are common in grocery sections of shops.

likely_response.local: Δίπλα στα μέλια, κοντά στο ταμείο.
likely_response.translation_en: Hello, the scale is at the back next to the local honeys, near the cash register counter.

responses.english: Hello, the scale is at the back next to the local honeys, near the cash register counter.
responses.french: Δίπλα στα μέλια, κοντά στο ταμείο.

phrases.intent_en: Cash or card for handwoven textiles?
phrases.text_local: Πληρώνω με μετρητά ή κάρτα για τα υφαντά;
phrases.cultural_note: Payment methods vary by shop size; haggling may be expected for crafts.

likely_response.local: Κάρτα στα μεγάλα, μετρητά στα μικρά.
likely_response.translation_en: Card at large shops, cash at small ones.

responses.english: Card at large shops, cash at small ones.
responses.french: Κάρτα στα μεγάλα, μετρητά στα μικρά.

phrases.intent_en: Is tax refund form available at this shop?
phrases.cultural_note: Tax refund forms are typically provided upon request at larger shops.

phrases.text_local: Πού είναι το κατάστημα με τα ελαιοξύλα;
phrases.cultural_note: Stores may not have signage in a foreign language. Staff assistance is expected.

likely_response.local: Δίπλα στο κατάστημα με τα κοσμήματα.
likely_response.translation_en: The shop with the olive wood carvings is a little farther down, on the same side of the street.

responses.english: The shop with the olive wood carvings is a little farther down, on the same side of the street.
responses.french: Δίπλα στο κατάστημα με τα κοσμήματα.
